'''ây-p-w''' ('''kayapaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:practise|practise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practise|practise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kayapaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyapaw|thiyapaw]] || [[word:jiyapaw|jiyapaw]] || [[word:shiyapaw|shiyapaw]] || [[word:kiyapaw|kiyapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyapaw|thuthuyapaw]] || [[word:jujuyapaw|jujuyapaw]] || [[word:shushuyapaw|shushuyapaw]] || [[word:kukuyapaw|kukuyapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyapaw|thuyapaw]] || [[word:juyapaw|juyapaw]] || [[word:shuyapaw|shuyapaw]] || [[word:kuyapaw|kuyapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyapaw|thuyapaw]] || [[word:juyapaw|juyapaw]] || [[word:shuyapaw|shuyapaw]] || [[word:kuyapaw|kuyapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyapaw|theyapaw]] || [[word:jeyapaw|jeyapaw]] || [[word:sheyapaw|sheyapaw]] || [[word:keyapaw|keyapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyapaw|thothoyapaw]] || [[word:jojoyapaw|jojoyapaw]] || [[word:shoshoyapaw|shoshoyapaw]] || [[word:kokoyapaw|kokoyapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyapaw|thoyapaw]] || [[word:joyapaw|joyapaw]] || [[word:shoyapaw|shoyapaw]] || [[word:koyapaw|koyapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyapaw|thoyapaw]] || [[word:joyapaw|joyapaw]] || [[word:shoyapaw|shoyapaw]] || [[word:koyapaw|koyapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyapaw|thĂŠyapaw]] || [[word:jĂŠyapaw|jĂŠyapaw]] || [[word:shĂŠyapaw|shĂŠyapaw]] || [[word:kĂŠyapaw|kĂŠyapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayapaw|thathayapaw]] || [[word:jajayapaw|jajayapaw]] || [[word:shashayapaw|shashayapaw]] || [[word:kakayapaw|kakayapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayapaw|thayapaw]] || [[word:jayapaw|jayapaw]] || [[word:shayapaw|shayapaw]] || [[word:kayapaw|kayapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayapaw|thayapaw]] || [[word:jayapaw|jayapaw]] || [[word:shayapaw|shayapaw]] || [[word:kayapaw|kayapaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayapaw|shayapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayapaw|goshayapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayapaw|gokishayapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayapawnĂŒ|shayapawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayapawnknĂŒ|goshayapawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayapawnĂŒ|gokishayapawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayapawshĂ«|shayapawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayapawnkshĂ«|goshayapawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayapawshĂ«|gokishayapawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayapawro|shayapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayapawnkro|goshayapawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayapawro|gokishayapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayapawmu|shayapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayapawnkmu|goshayapawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayapawmu|gokishayapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayapawsher|shayapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayapawnksher|goshayapawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayapawsher|gokishayapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayapawng|shayapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayapawnkng|goshayapawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayapawng|gokishayapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayapawya|shayapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayapawnkya|goshayapawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayapawya|gokishayapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayapawyam|shayapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayapawnkyam|goshayapawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayapawyam|gokishayapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayapawnĂŒshĂ«|shayapawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayapawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayapawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayapawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayapawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayapawnĂŒro|shayapawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayapawnknĂŒro|goshayapawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayapawnĂŒro|gokishayapawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayapawnĂŒmu|shayapawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayapawnknĂŒmu|goshayapawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayapawnĂŒmu|gokishayapawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayapawshĂ«nĂŒ|shayapawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayapawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayapawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayapawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayapawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayapawshĂ«ro|shayapawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayapawnkshĂ«ro|goshayapawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayapawshĂ«ro|gokishayapawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayapawshĂ«mu|shayapawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayapawnkshĂ«mu|goshayapawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayapawshĂ«mu|gokishayapawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayapawronĂŒ|shayapawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayapawnkronĂŒ|goshayapawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayapawronĂŒ|gokishayapawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayapawroshĂ«|shayapawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayapawnkroshĂ«|goshayapawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayapawroshĂ«|gokishayapawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayapawromu|shayapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayapawnkromu|goshayapawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayapawromu|gokishayapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayapawmunĂŒ|shayapawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayapawnkmunĂŒ|goshayapawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayapawmunĂŒ|gokishayapawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayapawmushĂ«|shayapawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayapawnkmushĂ«|goshayapawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayapawmushĂ«|gokishayapawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayapawmuro|shayapawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayapawnkmuro|goshayapawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayapawmuro|gokishayapawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
